title: Senior Software Engineer - Birlasoft International Enterprises - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Birlasoft International Enterprises - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Birlasoft International Enterprises in Gwalior offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Birlasoft International Enterprises:
Birlasoft International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birlasoft International Enterprises!
